products.name: Calus P307 plus power bank
products.description: The Calus P307 Plus is a compact 3000mAh power bank designed for emergency and on-the-go charging. It features a lightweight design, USB output for charging smartphones and small devices, and built-in safety protection against overcharging and short circuits. Its portable size makes it easy to carry in a pocket or bag for quick backup power when needed.

products.name: Samsung 25W Pd Adapter usb-c
products.description: The Samsung 25W PD USB-C Adapter is a compact and powerful fast charger designed to quickly and safely charge compatible smartphones, tablets, and other USB-C devices. Featuring 25W Power Delivery (PD) technology, it delivers efficient charging performance while built-in safety protections help guard against overheating, overcharging, and short circuits. Its lightweight design makes it ideal for home, office, and travel use.

products.name: Q-Seven Top 10
products.description: The Q-Seven Top 10 is a reliable feature phone designed for everyday communication. It features a clear display, dual SIM support, a long-lasting battery, wireless FM radio, Bluetooth connectivity, a bright torchlight, and a durable keypad for comfortable calling and texting. Its simple interface and compact design make it an ideal choice for users seeking a practical and easy-to-use mobile phone.

products.name: Multiprotective, Mobile & Classic
products.description: Strong and attractive

products.name: New Fashion Case cover
products.description: Affordable cover for girls

products.name: Micro Sd +Adapter    2GB
products.description: A MicroSD Card with Adapter provides reliable storage expansion for smartphones, tablets, cameras, and other compatible devices. The included SD adapter allows the MicroSD card to be used in devices with standard SD card slots, making it ideal for storing photos, videos, music, documents, and other important files with ease and convenience.

products.name: Samsung S11
products.description: The Samsung S11 Earphones deliver clear, balanced sound with enhanced bass for an immersive listening experience. Designed for comfort and durability, they feature an ergonomic fit, a built-in microphone for hands-free calls, and easy connectivity with smartphones, tablets, and other compatible devices. Perfect for music, calls, and everyday use.

products.name: FBM AM-04
products.description: The FBM Speaker is a portable Bluetooth speaker designed to deliver clear audio, powerful bass, and reliable wireless connectivity. With its compact design, long-lasting battery, and easy-to-use controls, it is perfect for enjoying music, podcasts, and hands-free calls at home, outdoors, or on the go.

products.name: Air F9 Pro+
products.description: The Air F9 Pro wireless earbuds deliver clear sound quality, deep bass, and stable Bluetooth connectivity for an enjoyable listening experience. Featuring touch controls, a comfortable ergonomic fit, noise reduction for calls, and a portable charging case with a long-lasting battery, they are perfect for music, calls, gaming, and everyday use.

products.name: HY HOYAN
products.description: The Hy Hoyan is a reliable and user-friendly mobile phone designed for everyday communication. It features a clear display, long-lasting battery life, dual SIM support, wireless FM radio, and a durable keypad, making it ideal for calling, texting, and basic mobile use. Its compact design and dependable performance offer convenience and value for daily needs.

products.name: Tecno T301

Its simple interface and dependable performance make it an excellent choice for users seeking a practical and easy-to-use mobile phone.

With its simple interface and dependable performance, it is an ideal choice for calling, texting, and basic mobile needs.

Its compact design and user-friendly interface make it an excellent choice for everyday mobile use.

products.name: It 2160
products.description: The Itel 2160 is a durable and easy-to-use feature phone designed for reliable everyday communication. It features a bright display, dual SIM support, a long-lasting battery, wireless FM radio, Bluetooth connectivity, a powerful speaker, and a comfortable keypad for effortless calling and texting. Its compact design and dependable performance make it an ideal choice for users who value simplicity and extended battery life.

products.name: WPH E1292
products.description: The WPH E1292 is a compact and reliable feature phone built for everyday communication. It features a bright display, dual SIM support, a long-lasting battery, wireless FM radio, Bluetooth connectivity, a powerful torchlight, and a durable keypad for easy calling and texting. Its simple interface and dependable performance make it an excellent choice for users seeking a basic and efficient mobile phone.

products.name: LSN 1046
products.description: The LSN 1046 is a dependable feature phone designed for simple and efficient communication. It features a clear display, dual SIM support, a long-lasting battery, wireless FM radio, Bluetooth connectivity, a bright flashlight, and a durable keypad for comfortable calling and texting. Its compact design and reliable performance make it a practical choice for everyday mobile use.

products.name: Ifinex N1000F
products.description: The Ifinex N1000F is a practical feature phone designed for users who need multiple SIM support and long battery life. It features a large display, Quad SIM (4 SIM cards) capability, a powerful 3300mAh battery, wireless FM radio, a bright torchlight, and a loud speaker for clear audio. Its durable keypad and simple interface make it ideal for everyday calling, texting, and basic mobile use

products.name: Itel 2160
products.description: The Itel 2160 is a durable and user-friendly feature phone built for reliable everyday communication. It comes with a bright display, dual SIM support, a long-lasting battery, wireless FM radio, a powerful speaker, Bluetooth connectivity, and a comfortable keypad for easy calling and texting. Its compact design and dependable performance make it an ideal choice for users seeking simplicity and extended battery life.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Pro Active
products.description: Track sports and health with high fidelity. Includes advanced Sleep-Tracking indices, Body Composition analyzer (BIA method), dynamic temperature sensing, dual frequency navigation GPS, and a rugged classic rotating tachymeter profile styled for elite fitness.

products.name: Premium Studio Earbuds Pro ANC
products.description: Adaptive dual transparency, immersive personal Spatial Audio rendering (dynamic head tracking), customized ultra-comfort tips, and a fine acoustic case charging via USB-C or MagSafe with up to 36 hours of integrated charging capacity.

products.name: Galaxy Tab S9 Ultra Slate Carbon
products.description: Large 14.6" dynamic AMOLED 2X canvas equipped with ultra-fast Qualcomm Snapdragon Gen 2 processing, standard high-precision active S-Pen, IP68 water/dust proofing, and split screen creative workspaces suited for professional designers.

specs.Audio Nodes: Quad Speakers by AKG Dolby Atmos

products.name: Asus ROG Ally Extreme Gaming Console
products.description: Play any game on the couch with AMD Ryzen Z1 Extreme power, high-frame-rate screen, seamless dual-active heat-pipe cooling channels, full ergonomic thumbstick design, and access to all standard Windows libraries.

products.name: Samsung  A07
products.description: Advanced Google-designed Google Tensor G3 chip, AI camera features including Magic Eraser and Audio Magic isolation, pro security architecture, and a bright Actua display that stands out.

products.name: Studio Master Soundbar Solo
products.description: Upgrade your living room cinematic experience with a plug-and-play Dolby Atmos certified active soundbar. Built-in, self-firing subwoofers bring chest-thumping bass and vocal details directly via a single HDMI eARC cord.

reviews.comment: Absolutely spectacular. The titanium build is light and feels extremely robust. Fast shipping directly by Kellys Store Team!
Gorgeous OLED, but the camera is slightly bulky. Performance is breathtaking, and M-Pesa automated billing cleared in 5 seconds.
Incredible compilation capability for my docker setups. Battery holds easily for a complete workday without plugging. Incredible premium device.

settings.bankDetails: Kelly Gadgets Store LTD, Equity Bank Kenya, Acc: 120034455828
settings.aboutText:
Welcome to Kelly's Gadgets Store, the premier technology destination established in 2026. Inspired by the lack of direct, high-quality, authentic consumer electronics retailers, Kelly Super Admin launched this platform to bridge the gap by offering premium smartphones, productivity laptops, accessories, elite smart watches, screen tablets, immersive speakers, and modern high-frame combat consoles.

Every single item in our inventory is strictly sourced directly from official manufacturing headquarters, ensuring that counterfeit risks are eliminated.
settings.aboutPledge: To respect consumer trust. We avoid the inflation common in third-party retail channels by providing real-time stock balances, dynamic discount triggers, automated invoice billing, and an absolute commitment to customer security under the surveillance of our two primary operations executives.
settings.contactAddress: Lavin Tower, First Floor, Sophia, Homabay, Kenya
